root_text.an8.79:1.1: “Aṭṭhime, bhikkhave, dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an8.79:1.3: Kammārāmatā, bhassārāmatā, niddārāmatā, saṅgaṇikārāmatā, indriyesu aguttadvāratā, bhojane amattaññutā, saṁsaggārāmatā, papañcārāmatā—
root_text.an8.79:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭha dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an8.79:2.1: Aṭṭhime, bhikkhave, dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an8.79:2.3: Na kammārāmatā, na bhassārāmatā, na niddārāmatā, na saṅgaṇikārāmatā, indriyesu guttadvāratā, bhojane mattaññutā, asaṁsaggārāmatā, nippapañcārāmatā—
root_text.an8.79:2.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭha dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.an8.79:1.1: “These eight things lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an8.79:1.3: They relish work, talk, sleep, and company. They don’t guard the sense doors and they eat too much. They relish closeness and proliferation.
translation_text.an8.79:1.4: These eight things lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an8.79:2.1: These eight things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an8.79:2.3: They don’t relish work, talk, sleep and company. They guard the sense doors, and they don’t eat too much. They don’t relish closeness and proliferation.
translation_text.an8.79:2.4: These eight things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.”
